offer: For construction contractors managing 5–10 projects/month, the complexity of converting architectural plans into permit application forms causes project delays. We automate this process instead of manual conversion.
problem: Difficulty in converting architectural plans into permit application forms, leading to delays in project initiation.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
